description_long: This beer garden features a rustic stone well with a wooden shingled roof, accompanied by a long, weathered wooden table and matching bench. The well is circular, constructed from rough stone, and has a bucket suspended from a crossbeam, suggesting functionality. The table and bench are made from thick, unfinished planks, with visible wood grain and some scattered objects such as bottles and mugs, evoking a communal outdoor setting. The entire arrangement sits on a flat, dark base, which contrasts with the lighter, natural tones of the wood and stone. The scene is devoid of decorative lighting or branded signage, focusing on a simple, utilitarian aesthetic. The overall impression is one of a traditional, rural beer garden with communal seating and a central water feature.
description: A rustic beer garden scene with a stone well, wooden shingled roof, and a long communal table with a bench, all set on a dark base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone well with a bucket, the wooden roof, and the full length of the table and bench with bottles and mugs on top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the well, the slanted roof, and the arrangement of the table and bench with visible objects.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the well and roof, with the table and bench partially visible to the side.
description_view_3: Side view showing the well's circular stone wall and the full length of the table and bench, emphasizing the rustic wood texture.
attribute_outdoor_seating_arrangement: One long wooden bench is placed alongside a matching wooden table, arranged parallel and close together for communal seating. No umbrellas or canopies are present, and the seating is simple and rustic.
attribute_large_communal_tables: One large communal table is visible, made of thick, weathered wood, approximately 2.5 meters long, with seating for 6-8 people on a single matching bench.
